description.ko: 날카로운 기하학적 구조와 의도적인 디지털 아티팩트가 결합된 정교한 하이테크 미학입니다. 이 테마는 KURO-X 에코시스템 내에서 세련된 미니멀리즘의 완벽함과 혼란스러운 글리치 미학의 교차점을 탐구합니다.
description.en: A sophisticated high-tech aesthetic merging sharp geometric structures with intentional digital artifacts. This theme explores the intersection of sleek minimalist perfection and chaotic glitch aesthetics within the KURO-X ecosystem.

prompt: KURO-X brand identity design, geometric glitch art style, sharp abstract polygons, digital distortion layers, chromatic aberration, pixel sorting effects, high-contrast monochrome black and white with neon cyan accents, cybernetic aesthetic, 8k resolution, sleek tech-focused composition, vector-like precision disrupted by chaotic digital noise.
